name_en: Graden party Black and white canvas with black
name_cn:
Graden party Black and white canvas with black
Casual Style Series, also a famous H house entry-level model. The design is relatively low-key, made of TC leather and canvas, high cost-performance, and very roomy. size: 30cm 36cm
